_comment: See README.md for full docs. Copy to config.json and fill in. Never commit config.json — it holds secrets.

skills._comment: autoSynthesize: after a successful multi-step session (>=3 tool calls, no errors), a background Haiku call may generate a reusable skill file under data/skills/. Set false to disable.

stt._comment: Voice transcription via Groq. When set, audio bytes are uploaded to api.groq.com. Omit this block to keep voice local-only.
